homepage_secrets.disabled.team_subtitle.text: Ko ngā hoa tīma whaimana i {domain} anake e taea ai te hanga hononga kotahi-wā hou ki konei. Ka taea tonu e ngā kaiwhiwhi te huaki i tētahi hononga kua tukuna ki a rātou.

homepage_secrets.disabled.public_subtitl.text: Ko ngā mema whaimana o tēnei taupānga anake e taea ai te hanga hononga kotahi-wā hou. Ka taea tonu e ngā kaiwhiwhi te huaki i tētahi hononga kua tukuna ki a rātou.

homepage_secrets.disabled.trust_viewed_o.text: Kua tirohia kotahitia, kātahi ka ngaro

homepage_secrets.disabled.promo_title.text: Hou: kei roto i ngā mahere kore-utu ngā rohe ritenga ināianei.

homepage_secrets.disabled.promo_subtitle.text: Tohua tō rohe ki Onetime Secret, ka tuku karere huna i raro i tō ake waitohu.
